case_title: REBECCA F. LEUNG et al VS. BILLY KIM CHAN et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
DEMAND FOR JURY AND MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT CHAN, BILLY KIM KUN CHAN, ALICE SUK NGAN

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Rebecca Leung, is present.
Attorney, Arnold Evje, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant,Billy Chan and Alice Chan , are present.
Attorney, Gregg Kleiner, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of NOV-29-2010 is vacated.
